title: chrysanthemum zawadzkii subsp. peleiolepis
intro: Chrysanthemum zawadzkii subsp. peleiolepis, also known as Korean chrysanthemum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese and Korean traditional medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and promoting digestion. Chrysanthemum zawadzkii subsp. peleiolepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
